# Read file
path = "/mnt/data/file-N9s45iWg5ggy8Lb9LDcj4g-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    data = f.read()
text = data.decode('utf-8')
len(text), text[:400]

spans = []
candidates = [
"وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٍ مَعْلُومٍ",
"إن أحَدَكُمْ يُجْمَعُ خَلْقُهُ في بَطْنِ أُمِّهِ أَرْبَعِينَ يَوْمَاً نُطْفَةً، ثُمَّ يَكُونُ عَلَقَةً مِثْلَ ذلكَ، ثُمَّ يَكُونُ مُضْغَةً مِثْلَ ذلكَ، ثُمَّ يُرْسَلُ المَلَكُ فَيَنْفُخُ فِيهِ الرُّوحَ، وَيُؤْمَرُ بأرْبَعِ كَلِماتٍ: بِكَتْب رِزْقِهِ وَأجَلِهِ وَعَمَلِهِ وَشَقِيٍّ أَوْ سَعِيدٍ",
"وَضَرَبَ الله مَثَلاً قَرْيَةً كَانَتْ آمِنَةً مُّطْمَئِنَّةً يَأْتِيهَا رِزْقُهَا رَغَداً مِّطْمَئِنَّا يَأْتِيهَا رِزْقُهَا رَغَدًا مِّطْمئنِّين"
]
for c in candidates:
    idx = text.find(c)
    print(c[:30], "->", idx)

targets = [
"وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٍ مَعْلُومٍ",
"إن أحَدَكُمْ يُجْمَعُ خَلْقُهُ في بَطْنِ أُمِّهِ أَرْبَعِينَ يَوْمَاً نُطْفَةً، ثُمَّ يَكُونُ عَلَقَةً مِثْلَ ذلكَ، ثُمَّ يَكُونُ مُضْغَةً مِثْلَ ذلكَ، ثُمَّ يُرْسَلُ المَلَكُ فَيَنْفُخُ فِيهِ الرُّوحَ، وَيُؤْمَرُ بأرْبَعِ كَلِماتٍ: بِكَتْب رِزْقِهِ وَأجَلِهِ وَعَمَلِهِ وَشَقِيٍّ أَوْ سَعِيدٍ",
"وَضَرَبَ الله مَثَلاً قَرْيَةً كَانَتْ آمِنَةً مُّطْمَئِنَّةً يَأْتِيهَا رِزْقُهَا رَغَداً مِّطْمَئِنَّا يَأْتِيهَا رِزْقُهَا رَغَدًا مِّطْمئنِّين",
"وَمَا مِنْ دَابَّةٍ فِي الْأَرْضِ إِلاَّ عَلَى اللَّهِ رِزْقُهَا",
"وَكَأَيِّنْ مِنْ دَابَّةٍ لا تَحْمِلُ رِزْقَهَا اللَّهُ يَرْزُقُهَا وَإِيَّاكُمْ",
"مَا يَفْتَحِ اللَّهُ لِلنَّاسِ مِنْ رَحْمَةٍ فَلا مُمْسِكَ لَهَا",
"وَإِنْ يُرِدْكَ بِخَيْرٍ فَلا رَادَّ لِفَضْلِهِ",
"لو أنَّ ابنَ آدمَ هرب من رزقِه كما يهرُبُ من الموتِ ، لأدركه رزقُه كما يُدرِكُه الموتُ"
]
for t in targets:
    start = 0
    while True:
        idx = text.find(t, start)
        if idx==-1:
            break
        print("Found:", t[:40], "at", idx)
        start = idx+1

# search for variant with hamza diacritics
for m in ["إنَّ أحَدَكُمْ","إن أحَدَكُمْ"]:
    idx = text.find(m)
    print(m, idx)

print(text[470:760])  # around first hadith
print("----")
print(text[3800:3880])  # around second occurrence

for t in ["وَضَرَبَ الله مَثَلاً كَرْيَةً","وَضَرَبَ الله مَثَلاً قَرْيَةً"]:
    print(t, text.find(t))
# find occurrences of the exact phrase we had
occ = []
start=0
t = "وَضَرَبَ الله مَثَلاً قَرْيَةً كَانَتْ آمِنَةً مُّطْمَئِنَّةً يَأْتِيهَا رِزْقُهَا رَغَداً مِّطْمَئِنَّا يَأْتِيهَا رِزْقُهَا رَغَدًا مِّطْمئنِّين"
while True:
    idx = text.find(t, start)
    if idx==-1:
        break
    occ.append(idx)
    start = idx+1
occ

occ=[]
start=0
t="وَضَرَبَ الله مَثَلاً قَرْيَةً"
while True:
    idx=text.find(t,start)
    if idx==-1: break
    occ.append(idx)
    start=idx+1
occ

occ=[]
start=0
t="وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٍ مَعْلُومٍ"
while True:
    idx=text.find(t,start)
    if idx==-1: break
    occ.append(idx)
    start=idx+1
occ

# find "روه مسلم" occurrences
text.find("روه مسلم"), text.find("رَوَهُ مسلم"), text.find("رواه مسلم")

# extract until closing quote index
start=987
end = text.find('"', start)
end, text[start:end]

s = 4211
e = 4410
span = text[s:e]
span[:200], len(span)

import json, sys

spans_info = []
# define starts with type and method
tasks = [
    {"start":211, "type":"Aya", "method":"quote"},
    {"start":484, "type":"Hadeeth", "method":"end_by_word", "end_word":"سَعِيدٍ"},
    {"start":3842, "type":"Hadeeth", "method":"end_by_word", "end_word":"سَعِيدٍ"},
    {"start":987, "type":"Aya", "method":"quote"},
    {"start":2714, "type":"Hadeeth", "method":"end_by_char", "char":")"},
    {"start":3512, "type":"Aya", "method":"end_by_char", "char":"["},
    {"start":3591, "type":"Aya", "method":"end_by_char", "char":"["},
    {"start":3691, "type":"Aya", "method":"end_by_char", "char":"["},
    {"start":3771, "type":"Aya", "method":"end_by_char", "char":"["},
    {"start":4211, "type":"Aya", "method":"end_by_char", "char":"﴾"}, # end before this char
    {"start":4451, "type":"Aya", "method":"end_by_char", "char":"﴾"}, # but this span is inside﴿...﴾, we want until char before '﴾'
    {"start":4691, "type":"Aya", "method":"end_by_char", "char":"﴾"},
    {"start":5244, "type":"Aya", "method":"end_by_str", "string":"..."},
]

def trim_edges(s, start, end):
    # Trim only allowed chars from edges: whitespace, quotes, arabic punctuation، ؛ : . , ! ? … tatweel ـ and brackets and quotes
    allowed_trim = set([" ", "\n", "\t", '"', "'", "«","»","'","\"", "(",")","[","]","{","}","<",">","،","؛",":",".",",","!","?","…","ـ"])
    # also strip Arabic bracket characters U+FD3F? But we've included '﴾' possibly. We'll trim any of these from ends.
    # Convert to indices
    s_text = text[start:end]
    # trim leading
    while s_text and s_text[0] in allowed_trim:
        s_text = s_text[1:]
        start += 1
    # trim trailing
    while s_text and s_text[-1] in allowed_trim:
        s_text = s_text[:-1]
        end -= 1
    return s_text, start, end

for t in tasks:
    s = t["start"]
    if t["method"]=="quote":
        end = text.find('"', s)
        if end==-1:
            # try alternative quotes maybe '«' or '»'
            end = text.find('”', s)
        # substring is text[s:end]
    elif t["method"]=="end_by_word":
        w = t["end_word"]
        # find occurrence of w starting s
        pos = text.find(w, s)
        if pos==-1:
            raise Exception("end word not found")
        end = pos + len(w)
    elif t["method"]=="end_by_char":
        ch = t["char"]
        # find the char position after the substring, but when we want to end before this char, find its index; use index of char if char is opening bracket. 
        pos = text.find(ch, s)
        if pos==-1:
            # maybe closing bracket?
            pos = text.find(ch.replace("﴾","﴿"), s)
            if pos==-1:
                raise Exception("end char not found for start "+str(s))
        end = pos  # exclude the char
    elif t["method"]=="end_by_str":
        st = t["string"]
        pos = text.find(st, s)
        if pos==-1:
            raise Exception("end string not found")
        end = pos
    # Now trim edges
    span_text, new_s, new_e = trim_edges(text, s, end)
    # verify
    assert text[new_s:new_e] == span_text, f"Mismatch for start {s}: raw[{new_s}:{new_e}] != span_text"
    spans_info.append({"span_start": new_s, "span_end": new_e, "span_text": span_text, "citation_type": t["type"]})

# print spans
for sp in spans_info:
    print(sp["span_start"], sp["span_end"], sp["citation_type"])
    print(repr(sp["span_text"])[:200])
    print("---")
